extensionDescription.message: Click once. Every work tab falls into place.

privacyBulletMetadata.message: Reads tab title, hostname, path, and tab state.

privacyBulletBody.message: Does not read page body unless you ask for summary later.

privacyBulletDuplicates.message: Safe exact/tracking duplicates may be closed, with Restore available.

privacyBulletProtected.message: Active, pinned, audible, incognito, and internal tabs are protected.

chatPlaceholder.message: Tell TabMosaic how to fix your groups...

summaryDescription.message: Reads visible text from the active page only after you click.

nextBuildCopy.message: Run real Chrome QA with multi-window work tabs.

clickIconToOrganize.message: Click the extension icon to organize your tabs.

reviewBasics.message: Review the basics, then start organizing.

extractingVisibleText.message: Extracting visible text from the active page...

pageCouldNotBeRead.message: The page could not be read.

tryChatExamples.message: Try: GitHub PR to Code Review, current tab to Reading, or rename Misc to Reading.

couldNotBuildSafeAction.message: I could not turn that into a safe tab action yet.

closeReviewedDuplicateConfirm.message:
Close this reviewed duplicate tab?

$1

You can restore it with Restore Closed.

noNativeGroupsYet.message: No native groups were created yet.

noProtectedTabsFound.message: No protected tabs found in this scan.

noCurrentTabsMatch.message: No current tabs match yet. Applying still saves the rule.

tabsTooFewCompleted.message: There are only a few tabs, so I checked the browser context without forcing groups.

restoreAvailableForClosedTabs.message: Restore is available for closed tabs.

scannedNoGroupableTabs.message: I scanned your browser, but did not find enough groupable tabs for native groups. $1

groupsSkippedByChrome.message: $1 groups were skipped by Chrome limits.

aiFellBackLocal.message: AI fell back to local rules.

createdGroupsMovedTabs.message: Created $1 native groups and moved $2 tabs. $3 $4 $5 $6

apiKeySavedPlaceholder.message: API key saved locally. Leave blank to keep it.

testingAIConnection.message: Testing AI provider without sending tab data...

aiConnectionModelMissing.message: Connection works, but the configured model was not listed: $1.

permissionsIntro.message: TabMosaic uses a small permission set for one-click grouping, undo, restore, dashboard state, and user-triggered current-page summary.

permissionTabsCopy.message: Reads tab title, hostname, path, and state so it can organize all normal windows and restore safe duplicates.

permissionTabGroupsCopy.message: Creates and updates real Chrome native tab groups.

permissionSidePanelCopy.message: Opens the sidebar control center after the toolbar click.

permissionStorageCopy.message: Stores local settings, rules, Undo/Restore snapshots, and the optional local API key.

permissionScriptingCopy.message: Reads visible text only from the active page after you click Summarize Current Tab.

permissionDeepSeekCopy.message: Used only when you enable DeepSeek classification and save your own API key.

permissionsNotRequested.message: Not requested: all URLs, history, bookmarks, cookies, webRequest, browsingData, or incognito access.

localDataDescription.message: Clears local rules, API key, recent results, Undo/Restore snapshots, chat drafts, and first-run privacy acceptance.

openSidePanelToPopulateDashboard.message: Open the side panel and organize tabs to populate the dashboard.

couldNotApplyGroupUpdate.message: Could not apply this group update.

localRulesActiveUntilKey.message: Local rules are active until you save an API key and enable AI.

diagnosticsDescription.message: Copies a redacted local QA snapshot and recent local error summary for bug reports. It excludes URLs, hostnames, tab titles, page text, and API keys.

clearLocalDataConfirm.message:
Clear TabMosaic local data on this device?

This removes saved rules, API key, recent results, Undo/Restore snapshots, chat drafts, and first-run privacy acceptance. It does not close or move tabs.

noNativeGroupsLatest.message: No native groups were created in the latest run.

noDuplicateCandidatesLatest.message: No duplicate candidates in the latest run.

noLocalRulesYet.message: No local rules yet. Create one from sidebar chat refine.
